channel.title: I made a blog for myself
channel.description:
I wanted to learn React and improve my CSS knowledge, so I made a site for myself using Frontity. It aims to be a blog/portfolio of my personal projects and cybersecurity practices. I played around with some crazy ideas because I wanted to give it a unique touch. The site is responsive, but not really optimized for mobile browsers though.
https://jasonsegnini.com

item.title: I made a blog for myself
item.dc:creator: segninijason
item.description:
I wanted to learn React and improve my CSS knowledge, so I made a site for myself using Frontity. It aims to be a blog/portfolio of my personal projects and cybersecurity practices. I played around with some crazy ideas because I wanted to give it a unique touch. The site is responsive, but not really optimized for mobile browsers though.

https://jasonsegnini.com

Read full topic
item.source: I made a blog for myself
